name: i-know-kungfu
description: Claude Code plugin that lets Claude write correctly in languages it does not know — and never pretend to. It grounds every symbol in fetched docs or verified compilation, runs all generated code in a Docker sandbox (the one truth oracle that cannot be faked), and learns from each mistake as a misconception -> correct-model lesson it recalls next time. Tracks an explicit epistemic state (verified / grounded / hypothesis) for everything it writes, keeps a self-improving per-language knowledge base under ~/.kungfu, and measures its own learning curve with a held-out benchmark.
